name: Ground
label: Ground
description:
Controls the floor and surrounding stage that the scene sits on —
ground surface, procedural stage and pool geometry, and (on HDRP)
the water system. A set of presets bundles these sub-features into
one-click looks like *Wood*, *Stage*, *Pool*, *Ocean* and
*Audio Visualizer*.


## Ground Height

Vertical offset for the stage center, in meters. Use this to
line the floor up with a tracked play area or a captured set so
actors do not sink into or float above the ground. Other anchors
(lights, cameras attached to the stage) follow this offset.


## Ground Settings

Sub-group that defines the floor disc itself — its surface
material, radius, and stage-aware visibility. See the
*Ground* group below for details.


## Stage Geometry

Procedural stage, runway, walls, and inner pool well that
surround the ground disc. See the *Stage / Pool* group
below for details. Stage geometry composes with the ground
disc — both can be visible at once.


## Water (HDRP)

HDRP-only water surface anchored to the stage center, used
by ocean and pool presets. See the *Water System* group
below for details. Re-applies whenever the stage geometry
changes so the water tracks the pool well. Not available
on URP — the water shader globals are cleared instead.


## Presets

The preset list combines the sub-features into named looks.
Picking a preset toggles the ground on or off, selects a floor
surface, and chooses a stage-geometry and water variant in one
step. Presets are the fastest way to switch between a plain
floor, a runway stage, a pool, an ocean, an audio visualizer
floor, a projector screen, or an LED box.

descriptions.zh-TW: 當存在舞台模型時隱藏地面。
descriptions.ko: 무대 모델이 있을 때 지면 숨기기.
descriptions.zh-CN: 当存在舞台模型时，隐藏地面。

values.name: Toon Shader
values.label: Toon Shader
values.description:
Overrides the actor's material with a global toon shader.

Enable the toggle to replace all materials with a unified toon
style. Adjust **Shading** and **Shadow** for the light/dark
balance, **Outline** for edge thickness, and **Ambient** for
the fill light level.

**Highlight Area** and **Soft Highlight** control how sharp
the bright areas are. **Shadow Area** and **Soft Shadow**
do the same for dark areas.

**Specular** and **Soft Specular** add shiny reflections
to lit surfaces.

**Receive Shadow** (non-HDRP only) lets the material
receive shadows from other objects.

balance, **Outline** for edge thickness, and **Ambient** for

**Highlight Area** and **Soft Highlight** control how sharp
the bright areas are. **Shadow Area** and **Soft Shadow**
do the same for dark areas.

**Specular** and **Soft Specular** add shiny reflections
to lit surfaces.

**Receive Shadow** (non-HDRP only) lets the material
receive shadows from other objects.)

values.name: Special Shader
values.label: Special Shader

labels.ja: スペシャルシェーダー

values.description:
Overrides the shader type for all materials on the actor.

**Mode** selects the shader: *Off* uses the default shader;
*Refraction Thick/Thin* simulates glass with refractive
transparency; *Outline* renders only the outline edges;
*Unlit* disables all lighting; *Experiment* is a
placeholder for custom shader effects.

**Refraction** controls the index of refraction for glass
modes — higher values bend light more.

**Thickness** adjusts the perceived depth of thin glass
refraction.

Enable the toggle to replace all materials with a unified toon

to lit surfaces.

**Receive Shadow** (non-HDRP only) lets the material
receive shadows from other objects.)
descriptions.zh-TW:
(Overrides the actor's material with a global toon shader.

Enable the toggle to replace all materials with a unified toon
style. Adjust **Shading** and **Shadow** for the light/dark
balance, **Outline** for edge thickness, and **Ambient** for
the fill light level.

**Highlight Area** and **Soft Highlight** control how sharp
the bright areas are. **Shadow Area** and **Soft Shadow**
do the same for dark areas.

**Specular** and **Soft Specular** add shiny reflections
to lit surfaces.

**Receive Shadow** (non-HDRP only) lets the material
receive shadows from other objects.)

(Overrides the actor's material with a global toon shader.

to lit surfaces.

values.name: Special Shader
values.label: Special Shader

labels.ja: スペシャルシェーダー

values.description:
Overrides the shader type for all materials on the actor.

**Mode** selects the shader: *Off* uses the default shader;
*Refraction Thick/Thin* simulates glass with refractive
transparency; *Outline* renders only the outline edges;
*Unlit* disables all lighting; *Experiment* is a
placeholder for custom shader effects.

**Refraction** controls the index of refraction for glass
modes — higher values bend light more.

**Thickness** adjusts the perceived depth of thin glass
refraction.

refraction.)

values.name: Viewing Angle
values.label: Viewing Angle
values.description: Reduce brightness when viewed from an angle. 0 = perfect

descriptions.ja: 斜めから見たときの明るさを軽減する。0 = 完璧。
descriptions.zh-TW: 減少從角度觀看時的亮度。0 = 完美
descriptions.ko: 각도에서 볼 때 밝기 감소. 0 = 완벽
descriptions.zh-CN: 从角度观看时减少亮度。0 = 完美

labels.ja: オーディオビジュアライザー

values.name: Auto BPM
values.label: Auto BPM
values.description: Use real-time automatically detected BPM instead of the set BPM.

descriptions.ja: 設定されたBPMではなく、リアルタイムで自動検出されたBPMを使用します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 使用實時自動偵測的BPM，而非設定的BPM。
descriptions.ko: 설정된 BPM 대신 실시간으로 자동으로 감지된 BPM을 사용합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 使用实时自动检测的 BPM，而不是设置的 BPM。

values.name: Water System
values.label: Water System
values.description: Water System

descriptions.ja: 水システム
descriptions.zh-TW: 水體系統
descriptions.ko: 물 시스템
descriptions.zh-CN: 水系统

values.name: Height
values.label: Height
values.description: Height of water level.

descriptions.ja: 水位の高さ
descriptions.zh-TW: 水面高度
descriptions.ko: 수위 높이.
descriptions.zh-CN: 水面高度。

values.name: Ripples
values.label: Ripples
values.description: Intensity of small wave

descriptions.ja: 小さな波の強度
descriptions.zh-TW: 小波強度
descriptions.ko: 잔파 강도
descriptions.zh-CN: 小波强度

values.name: Large Wave
values.label: Large Wave
values.description: Intensity of large wave

descriptions.ja: 大きな波の強度
descriptions.zh-TW: 大波強度
descriptions.ko: 큰 파도 강도
descriptions.zh-CN: 大波强度

values.name: Refraction Max Distance
values.label: Refraction Max Distance
values.description: Controls the maximum distance in meters used to clamp the under water refraction depth. Higher value increases the distortion amount.

descriptions.ja: 水中屈折深さをクランプするために使用される最大距離（メートル）を制御します。値が高いほど、歪みの量が増加します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 控制用於夾帶水下折射深度的最大距離。較高的數值會增加扭曲程度。
descriptions.ko: 물 속 굴절 깊이를 클램핑하는 데 사용되는 최대 거리를 제어합니다. 값이 높을수록 왜곡 양이 증가합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 控制用于限制水下折射深度的最大距离（米）。数值越高，失真程度越大。

values.name: Absorption Distance
values.label: Absorption Distance
values.description: Max distance you can see in the water from above.

descriptions.ja: 上から水で見渡せる最大距離。
descriptions.zh-TW: 從上方可以看到的水最大距離。
descriptions.ko: 위에서 볼 수 있는 물 속의 최대 거리.
descriptions.zh-CN: 从上方能看到的最大水下距离。

values.name: Caustics
values.label: Caustics
values.description: Caustics effect

descriptions.ja: カウスティクス効果
descriptions.zh-TW: 神光效果
descriptions.ko: 카우스틱 효과
descriptions.zh-CN: 焦散效果

values.name: Absorption Multiplier
values.label: Absorption Multiplier
values.description: Multiplication applied to the Absorption Distance when viewing from below.

descriptions.ja: 下から見た際の吸収距離に乗算される係数。
descriptions.zh-TW: 從下方觀看時，應用於吸收距離的乘數。
descriptions.ko: 아래에서 볼 때 흡수 거리에 적용되는 곱셈.
descriptions.zh-CN: 从下方观察时应用于吸收距离的乘数。

values.name: Wave Range
values.label: Wave Range
values.description: Height of wet effect on materials.

descriptions.ja: 素材の濡れ効果の高さ。
descriptions.zh-TW: 材料潮濕效果的高度。
descriptions.ko: 재질에 대한 젖은 효과의 높이.
descriptions.zh-CN: 湿润效果对材质的高度。
